instructions.en: This card ties together a Resource Type and Use Type with timeframe based on cultural period or actual dates.  For a separate combination Style and Use Type, create a separate entry.
One assessment of condition at a particular point in time.
Enter information for identifiers of the resource from other external sources.

description.en:
The name of a resource.

Applies to Heritage Resource, Heritage Resource Group, Activity, and Historical Event.  Actors receive their "names" from the Appellation branch.

description.en: This resource model describes heritage resource groups which are groupings of historically significant resources.  Those historically significant resource may more may not themselves be instances of Heritage Resource.  v3
